patches.description: Enable local Studo Pro features: Your Calendar expands to 40 weeks, Exam overview in your calendar, No automated ads, Mail search, View all mail folders, Exam registration notification.
patches.name: Enable Studo Pro

patches.description: Removes Advertisements from the app interface.
patches.name: Hide Ads

patches.description: Hides the cookie consent window that advertises Studo Pro.
patches.name: Hide Cookie Consent Dialog

patches.description: Hides unrelated news, allowing only Chat topics and Job listings.
patches.name: Hide Promotional News

patches.description: Hide the message that reminds the user that their StudoPro expired.
patches.name: Hide Studo-Pro-expired message
